---
title: "multiomics_integration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-16"
---
Cellular

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Load pre-cleaned data (cleaning done separately)
prot_clean <- read_csv("cellular_proteomics_clean_v2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
rna <- read_csv("DESeq2_results_expr_filtered.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(gene_symbol = mgi_symbol) %>%
  rename(
    rna_baseMean   = baseMean,
    rna_log2FC     = log2FoldChange,
    rna_lfcSE      = lfcSE,
    rna_pvalue     = pvalue,
    rna_padj       = padj,
    rna_ensembl_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    rna_gene_label = gene_label
  ) %>%
  select(-`...1`)

# Inner join to keep only genes with BOTH proteomics & RNA data
integrated <- prot_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_symbol) & gene_symbol != "") %>%
  inner_join(rna, by = "gene_symbol", relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  # De-duplicate: if multiple RNA rows map to same gene, keep best (lowest padj)
  group_by(gene_symbol, protein_groups) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = rna_padj, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(integrated, "multi_omics_integrated_cellular.csv", na = "")
message("✔ Wrote multi_omics_integrated_cellular.csv (", nrow(integrated), " rows)")


integrated_sig <- integrated %>%
  filter(
    (`is.significant.M03-D14` == TRUE | `is.significant.M18-M03` == TRUE) &
    rna_padj < 0.05 & !is.na(rna_padj)
  )

write_csv(integrated_sig, "multi_omics_significant_cellular.csv", na = "")
message("✔ Wrote multi_omics_significant_cellular.csv (", nrow(integrated_sig), " rows)")
```

Soluble

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Load pre-cleaned data (cleaning done separately)
prot_clean <- read_csv("soluble_proteomics_clean_v2.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
rna <- read_csv("DESeq2_results_expr_filtered.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  rename(gene_symbol = mgi_symbol) %>%
  rename(
    rna_baseMean   = baseMean,
    rna_log2FC     = log2FoldChange,
    rna_lfcSE      = lfcSE,
    rna_pvalue     = pvalue,
    rna_padj       = padj,
    rna_ensembl_id = ensembl_gene_id,
    rna_gene_label = gene_label
  ) %>%
  select(-`...1`)


# Inner join to keep only genes with BOTH proteomics & RNA data
integrated <- prot_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene_symbol) & gene_symbol != "") %>%
  inner_join(rna, by = "gene_symbol", relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  # De-duplicate: if multiple RNA rows map to same gene, keep best (lowest padj)
  group_by(gene_symbol, protein_groups) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = rna_padj, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

write_csv(integrated, "multi_omics_integrated_soluble.csv", na = "")
message("✔ Wrote multi_omics_integrated_soluble.csv (", nrow(integrated), " rows)")


integrated_sig <- integrated %>%
  filter(
    (`is.significant.M03-D14` == TRUE | `is.significant.M18-M03` == TRUE) &
    rna_padj < 0.05 & !is.na(rna_padj)
  )

write_csv(integrated_sig, "multi_omics_significant_soluble.csv", na = "")
message("✔ Wrote multi_omics_significant_soluble.csv (", nrow(integrated_sig), " rows)")
```
